dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
A small Python module for determining appropriate platform-specific
dirs, e.g. a "user data dir"
dependencies.name: py-platformdirs

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description:
Tomli is a Python library for parsing TOML. Tomli is fully compatible
with TOML v1.0.0.
dependencies.name: py-tomli

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
Axom provides a robust, flexible software infrastructure for the
development of multi-physics applications and computational tools.
dependent_to.name: axom

dependent_to.description:
MMCV is a foundational python library for computer vision research and
supports many research projects in MMLAB, such as MMDetection and
MMAction.
dependent_to.name: py-mmcv

dependent_to.description:
MMEngine is a foundational python library for deep learning models based
on PyTorch.
dependent_to.name: py-mmengine

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
